mechanics.name: Kameo Assists
mechanics.description: Call an assist character to perform a unique attack, extend combos, or interrupt the opponent. Costs Kameo Meter.

mechanics.name: Fatal Blow
mechanics.description: A devastating, cinematic armor-piercing attack available only when your health drops below 30%. Can only be successfully landed once per match.

mechanics.name: Breaker
mechanics.description: Interrupt an opponents combo by breaking away. Costs 3 bars of Super Meter and your full Kameo Meter.

mechanics.name: Upblock
mechanics.description: A parry against jumping attacks and overheads. If successful, you recover much faster than a standard block, allowing for a huge punish.

mechanics.name: Flawless Block
mechanics.description: Blocking an attack at the exact moment it connects. Reduces chip damage and pushback.
